name: important information（Knight）
message: We are about to close the old panel and blog and in version 2. 0 we renamed it Knight. We are releasing the new panel and program this week.We are still recruiting new teams, but you must have enough experience. We have a major update in version 2.0 and our only contact TOX：9096AD7062A4232F5AA31C2F7C4DF0AC1EAD10B78D40A6A3328AD142A42B555E635954D8B6C5
